task: Audit the APXM project for build, test, policy, TODO, and compiler coverage issues.

nodes.name: build_check
nodes.prompt: Run the APXM build and summarize warnings and errors as JSON.

nodes.name: test_check
nodes.prompt: Run the test suite and summarize pass/fail counts as JSON.

nodes.name: policy_check
nodes.prompt: Run policy checks and summarize violations as JSON.

nodes.name: todo_scan
nodes.prompt: Count TODO, FIXME, stub, and unimplemented markers in core crates.

nodes.name: synthesize_audit
nodes.prompt: Synthesize audit findings into status, prioritized issues, and concrete next actions.
